title: Star Power

Star Power Is a Modpack That Makes Your FPS Get a Big Boost and it has shader Support

## Shader Support
The Modpack Uses The Mod iris To Have Shaders Suport witch Is a Mod That Makes a Shader engine

## FPS
This Modpack Uses Lots Of FPS Mod to make Your FPS Good With These Mods

- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- And More

## No Bugs
This Modpack Should have no Bugs in it
## AD
None
